sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88063" key="promulai/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προμῠλαία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n88063.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">goddess who presides over mills,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:180" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.180</biblScope> </bibl>; expld. by <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεὸς</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
